name: Night Owl
description: Night Owl, a fast-moving vigilante trained by the shadowed legend Umbra, turning rooftops into runways and darkness into her ally. Armed with relentless discipline, razor-sharp instincts, and a belt full of gadgets, she proves you don’t need powers to stand toe-to-toe with legends. Bright, bold, and unafraid of the night, Night Owl carries Umbra’s legacy forward with agility, heart, and unbreakable resolve.
creator: ArcWarden
